feedbackRemark: Train not came on time not left on time if left on time y we will raise complaint
complaintDesc: Subject Complaint regarding inadequate stoppage of Train No. 17430 at Medchal Station and request for full refund I would like to lodge a serious complaint regarding the operation of Train No. 17430 at Medchal Railway Station Telangana which resulted in us being unable to board the train despite holding valid confirmed tickets. Ticket Details - PNR 1 4861456983 (Journey booked from Kacheguda to Tirupati) - PNR 2 4141500446 (Journey booked from Medchal to Kacheguda on the same train so that my mother could board from Medchal) Since we were unable to reach Kacheguda in time we booked an additional ticket from Medchal to Kacheguda on the same train specifically to enable my 57-year-old mother to board from Medchal. However at Medchal Railway Station - There was no coach position display on the platform. - No announcement regarding coach positions was made. - Our reserved coach was A1 and we had to search for its location after the train arrived. - By the time we reached the A1 coach the train started moving. - The train hardly stopped for even one minute making it impossible especially for a senior citizen to board safely. This is a serious lapse on the part of the Railways. Passengers cannot be expected to board safely without proper coach position information announcements and a reasonable halt. The extremely short stoppage coupled with the absence of guidance directly caused us to miss the train despite having valid confirmed tickets. We suffered financial loss as the tickets went unused solely due to operational deficiencies at the station and not because of any negligence on our part. I request the Railway Administration to 1. Investigate why Train No. 17430 stopped for such a short duration at Medchal Station. 2. Explain why there was no coach position display or announcement for passengers. 3. Refund the full fare for both PNRs (4861456983 and 4141500446) as we were denied a reasonable opportunity to board the train due to Railway operational failures. 4. Take corrective measures to ensure proper coach position displays announcements and adequate stoppage time at Medchal Station so that other passengers especially senior citizens do not face similar hardships. I request that this complaint be treated as a matter of passenger safety and service deficiency and that appropriate action be taken at the earliest.
remarks: Sorry for the inconvenience caused. Medchal station is a SG-3 Category station as per norms of the station amenities has been provided at the station. Train came Ontime and left on Time. Kindly look into matter. For coach announcements matter has been forwarded to concerned staff for necessary action. Thank you for writing to us
